name: Western Union
description_short: Denver's Western Union at 1255 S Federal Blvd offers money transfers and check cashing with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Western Union at 1255 S Federal Blvd in Denver, CO, operates as a standalone location serving the South Denver area. This Denver facility maintains extended hours to serve the community: Monday through Friday from 8AM to 8PM, and Saturday and Sunday from 8AM to 6PM. The location specializes in quick transactions without requiring a bank account.

At this Denver Western Union, you can send money domestically and internationally, cash checks, pay bills, and access prepaid cards and money orders. The staff can assist with wire transfers and other financial services. For questions about specific services or to confirm availability, call +1 303-628-7000 during business hours.

If you're in Denver and need same-day money transfers or check cashing, this South Federal Boulevard location is convenient for weekday errands. Bring a valid government-issued ID for transactions. Western Union remains a trusted option for quick financial services across Colorado.
pros: Global network of agent locations providing widespread geographic accessibility
Established 24/7 customer support at corporate headquarters (+1-720-332-1000)
Dedicated media relations team indicating institutional transparency and accountability
Services available without requiring a bank account, serving unbanked populations
Multiple service options from single locations including wire transfers, money orders, check cashing, and bill payment
Long-standing brand recognition and history in money transfer services
cons: Website contact page does not display specific fee structures or service pricing information
Technical service interruptions noted (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable during access)
Limited self-service options; customers must visit agent locations for transactions
No online service comparison tools or transparent rate calculators visible on contact page
Requires visiting third-party agent locations rather than company-owned facilities
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking services
International money transfer senders needing global reach and reliability
Consumers in remote or rural areas with limited banking infrastructure
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international money senders who value established brand reliability and widespread physical accessibility over digital convenience. The primary caveat is that specific fee structures and detailed service information are not available on the contact page itself—customers must contact a local agent or call corporate headquarters for pricing details and service specifics.
services: Agent location network for in-person transactions
meta_description: Western Union at 1255 S Federal Blvd, Denver, CO. Money transfers and check cashing with extended hours Mon–Fri 8AM–8PM.
